title: Minority Report
summary: A music journalist’s feature article propels Nick Songs and his previously unknown band Footnote to the cusp of stardom. But as his fame increases, Nick finds himself increasingly under the spotlight, and firmly in the sights of mysterious web-sleuths keen to investigate his chequered past.
